title: Internal Server Error when sending HTTP request to fal.ai
symptom: The HTTP request to fal.ai fails with a 500 Internal Server Error. The error message indicates that the service was unable to process the request.
not_this_if: The request is successful with publicly available links
root_cause: The error occurs because the links provided in the request (e.g., Google Drive links) are not publicly accessible. The fal.ai service cannot retrieve the resources needed to process the request, resulting in an internal server error.
fix_steps: Ensure that all links provided in the request are publicly accessible.
Test the request again with valid sample links.
agent_instruction: Check and update the links in your HTTP request to ensure they are publicly accessible.
